stories.title: Sources: NCAA tournaments set to expand to 76
stories.summary: The NCAA has initiated the final steps to expand the men's and women's NCAA basketball tournaments to 76 teams, with sources telling ESPN that clearing the final steps needed is just a formality.

stories.title: Sources: NBA finalizing lottery reform proposal
stories.summary: The NBA has proposed a new anti-tanking draft reform that expands the lottery, flattens odds and penalizes the bottom three teams, sources told ESPN.

stories.title: Last-place Phillies fire Thomson amid woeful start...
stories.summary: The Phillies, off to their worst start to a season in more than two decades, fired manager Rob Thomson and tried to hire Alex Cora as his replacement.

stories.title: PSG edge Bayern in historic 9-goal UCL semifinal
stories.summary: PSG came out on top 5-4 in the highest-scoring UCL semifinal on record, but Bayern will like their chances in the second leg at home after going almost blow for blow with the defending champions in an instant European classic.

stories.title: Source: Jets considering Russell Wilson for QB2
stories.summary: The Jets, exploring the veteran backup quarterbacks available, had Russell Wilson in for a visit late Monday night, a source told ESPN's Rich Cimini.
